head.b:skin: :root{color-scheme:light;--bg-color:#faf9f4;--text-color:#20201d;--meta-color:#6b6960;--accent-color:#55703e;--accent-bg:color-mix(in srgb,var(--accent-color) 10%,transparent);--persimmon:#d97757;--btn-bg:rgba(40,36,28,0.04);--border-color:#e8e3d7;--icon-color:#6f6d64;--container-width:700px;--glass-bg:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(252,250,244,0.46),rgba(249,247,239,0.30));--glass-panel:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(253,251,246,0.62),rgba(250,248,241,0.52));--glass-blur:blur(22px) saturate(185%);--glass-fill:rgba(252,250,245,0.62);--glass-edge:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.8),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.34);--glass-drop:0 5px 16px rgba(40,36,28,0.10);--glass-drop-pop:0 14px 32px rgba(40,36,28,0.16);--glass-tint:color-mix(in srgb,var(--accent-color) 18%,transparent);--ease:cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);--ease-out:cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);--ease-spring:cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)}[data-theme="dark"]{color-scheme:dark;--bg-color:#1a1915;--text-color:#e4e1d8;--meta-color:#918e83;--accent-color:#a6c187;--accent-bg:color-mix(in srgb,var(--accent-color) 10%,transparent);--btn-bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);--border-color:#2d2b25;--icon-color:#918e83;--glass-bg:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(58,57,53,0.34),rgba(48,47,43,0.28));--glass-panel:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(52,51,47,0.58),rgba(44,43,40,0.50));--glass-fill:rgba(52,51,47,0.56);--glass-edge:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06);--glass-drop:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.40);--glass-drop-pop:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.50);--glass-tint:color-mix(in srgb,var(--accent-color) 24%,transparent)}@supports not ((-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(1px)) or (backdrop-filter:blur(1px))){:root{--glass-bg:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(250,248,242,0.97),rgba(248,246,238,0.96));--glass-panel:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(251,249,244,0.98),rgba(249,247,240,0.97));--glass-fill:rgba(250,248,243,0.98)}[data-theme="dark"]{--glass-bg:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(46,45,41,0.97),rgba(40,39,36,0.96));--glass-panel:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(46,45,41,0.98),rgba(40,39,36,0.97));--glass-fill:rgba(44,43,40,0.98)}}@font-face{font-family:'Inter Fallback';src:local('Arial'),local('Roboto'),local('Helvetica Neue'),local('Liberation Sans');size-adjust:107.12%;ascent-override:90.44%;descent-override:22.52%;line-gap-override:0%}@font-face{font-family:'EB Garamond Fallback';src:local('Georgia'),local('Times New Roman'),local('Noto Serif'),local('Liberation Serif');size-adjust:86.36%;ascent-override:116.60%;descent-override:34.51%;line-gap-override:0%}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;padding:0;background:var(--bg-color);color:var(--text-color);font-family:'Inter','Inter Fallback',"PingFang SC","Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif;line-height:1.8;font-size:16px;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;text-size-adjust:100%;font-synthesis:weight small-caps;transition:background-color 0.3s var(--ease),color 0.3s var(--ease)}a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.3s var(--ease)}a:hover{color:var(--accent-color)}::selection{background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--accent-color) 24%,transparent)}a:focus-visible,button:focus-visible,input:focus-visible,textarea:focus-visible,[tabindex]:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--accent-color);outline-offset:3px;border-radius:4px}a:focus:not(:focus-visible),button:focus:not(:focus-visible){outline:none}.skip-link{position:fixed;left:12px;top:-80px;z-index:100;padding:10px 18px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--accent-color);font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:var(--glass-drop-pop);transition:top 0.25s var(--ease-out)}.skip-link,.skip-link:hover,.skip-link:focus{color:var(--bg-color)}.skip-link:focus{top:12px;outline:none}#main-content:focus{outline:none}.related-posts,.comments-wrapper,.related-posts li,.site-footer{transition:border-color 0.3s var(--ease)}.post-outer + .post-outer::before{transition:background-color 0.3s var(--ease)}.post-tag,.read-more,.blog-pager a,.comment-toggle-btn,.main-nav li a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:8px 14px;background:var(--btn-bg);color:var(--text-color);border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:30px;min-height:40px;transition:background 0.3s var(--ease),color 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.3s var(--ease-spring),border-color 0.3s var(--ease);font-weight:500;font-size:0.95rem;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;font-family:inherit;letter-spacing:0.5px}.main-nav li a{font-size:0.9rem}.main-nav li a.is-active{background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent-color);font-weight:600}.comment-toggle-btn{padding:10px 24px;min-height:48px}.read-more,.blog-pager a{font-size:0.9rem}.read-more{margin-top:15px}.comment-toggle-btn{width:100%;max-width:350px;display:flex;margin:0 auto 20px auto}.post-tag:hover,.read-more:hover,.blog-pager a:hover,.comment-toggle-btn:hover,.main-nav li a:hover{background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent-color);transform:translateY(-2px)}.post-tag:active,.read-more:active,.blog-pager a:active,.comment-toggle-btn:active,.main-nav li a:active{transform:scale(0.96)}.comment-toggle-btn{background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent-color);border-color:transparent;font-weight:600}.comment-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--accent-bg);background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--accent-color) 18%,transparent);color:var(--accent-color);border-color:transparent;transform:translateY(-2px)}.post-tag{display:inline;background:transparent;border:none;border-radius:0;padding:0;margin:0;min-height:0;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.3px;color:var(--meta-color)}.post-tag::before{content:'\00B7';margin:0 8px;opacity:0.6}.post-meta .post-tag:first-child::before{content:none}.post-tag:hover{background:transparent;color:var(--accent-color);transform:none}.outer-wrapper{max-width:var(--container-width);margin:0 auto;padding:0 25px;position:relative}.site-header,nav.main-nav,#main-content,.site-footer,.top-actions{transition:opacity 0.5s var(--ease-out),transform 0.5s var(--ease-out)}.content-fade-out{opacity:0!important;transform:translateY(8px)!important;pointer-events:none}.top-actions{position:absolute;top:30px;right:25px;display:flex;gap:12px;z-index:10}.action-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--icon-color);cursor:pointer;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:48px;height:48px;transition:background 0.3s var(--ease),color 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.3s var(--ease-spring)}.action-btn:hover{background:var(--btn-bg);color:var(--accent-color);transform:translateY(-2px)}#theme-icon{width:22px;height:22px;transition:transform 0.5s var(--ease)}[data-theme="dark"] #theme-icon{transform:rotate(90deg)}.sun-icon{display:none;stroke:currentColor;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;fill:none}.moon-icon{display:block;fill:currentColor;stroke:none}[data-theme="dark"] .sun-icon{display:block}[data-theme="dark"] .moon-icon{display:none}.text-toggle-btn{font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:500}[data-lang="zh"] .lang-en,[data-lang="en"] .lang-zh,[data-variant="simp"] .variant-trad,[data-variant="trad"] .variant-simp{display:none!important}#variant-toggle{transition:width 0.3s var(--ease),margin 0.3s var(--ease),opacity 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.3s var(--ease)}[data-lang="en"] #variant-toggle{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:scale(0.5);width:0;margin-left:-12px;pointer-events:none}.site-header{padding:80px 0 30px;text-align:left}.header-title h1{font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',serif;font-weight:500;font-size:clamp(2.3rem,2.05rem + 0.7vw,2.7rem);margin:0;letter-spacing:-0.5px;word-break:normal;overflow-wrap:break-word;line-break:strict;line-height:1.3}.header-logo-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-start;gap:18px;border:none!important;padding:12px 0;min-height:60px;color:var(--text-color);transition:transform 0.3s var(--ease-spring),color 0.3s var(--ease)}.header-logo-link:hover{transform:scale(1.02)}.header-logo-link svg{flex-shrink:0!important;width:55px;height:55px}.header-desc{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.4;color:var(--meta-color);margin-top:10px;font-style:normal;text-align:left;max-width:52ch;transition:color 0.3s var(--ease)}nav.main-nav{margin-bottom:35px;text-align:center;overflow:visible;position:relative}nav.main-nav.is-scrolling{overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;padding:6px 20px;margin-top:-6px;margin-left:-20px;margin-right:-20px}nav.main-nav.is-scrolling::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}nav.main-nav.is-scrolling ul{justify-content:flex-start}.main-nav ul{margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none;display:flex;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:nowrap;gap:10px}.main-nav li{display:inline-block;margin:0;flex-shrink:0}.post-outer{margin-bottom:70px;content-visibility:auto;contain-intrinsic-size:100px 500px;position:relative}.post-outer + .post-outer::before{content:'';display:block;width:40px;height:1px;background:var(--border-color);margin:0 auto 60px;opacity:0.7}.infinite-sentinel{height:1px;margin-top:40px}.infinite-status{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:40px auto 60px;min-height:32px;color:var(--meta-color);font-size:0.9rem;font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',Georgia,serif;font-style:italic;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s var(--ease)}.infinite-status.is-visible{opacity:1}.infinite-status .loading-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent-color);animation:infinite-pulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes infinite-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:0.3;transform:scale(0.9)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.1)}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.infinite-status .loading-dot{animation:none;opacity:0.7}}.infinite-status .end-dingbat{color:var(--meta-color);letter-spacing:0.8em;font-size:0.85rem;padding-left:0.8em}.infinite-status .retry-btn{margin-top:8px;background:var(--btn-bg);color:var(--text-color);border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:30px;padding:6px 18px;font-size:0.85rem;font-family:inherit;font-style:normal;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.3s var(--ease),color 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.3s var(--ease-spring)}.infinite-status .retry-btn:hover{background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent-color);transform:translateY(-1px)}h2.post-title{font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,1.62rem + 0.48vw,2.05rem);margin:0 0 10px;line-height:1.45;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:-0.3px;word-break:normal;overflow-wrap:anywhere;text-wrap:balance;hyphens:auto}h2.post-title:lang(zh),h2.post-title[lang^="zh"]{word-break:break-word;overflow-wrap:break-word;text-wrap:auto;line-break:strict;letter-spacing:normal}h2.post-title a{border:none;display:inline-block;padding:10px 0;min-height:48px;color:var(--text-color);transition:color 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.3s var(--ease-spring)}h2.post-title a:hover{color:var(--accent-color);transform:translateX(2px)}.post-meta{font-size:0.85rem;font-feature-settings:"onum" 1,"liga" 1;color:var(--meta-color);margin-bottom:20px;letter-spacing:0.5px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;transition:color 0.3s var(--ease)}.post-body.full-content{font-size:1.15rem;word-break:break-word;line-height:2.2;text-align:justify;font-feature-settings:"liga" 1,"calt" 1;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility}.post-body.full-content>p:first-of-type{font-size:1.22rem;line-height:1.85}.post-body a{color:var(--text-color);text-decoration:underline;text-decoration-thickness:1px;text-underline-offset:4px;text-decoration-color:color-mix(in srgb,currentColor 50%,transparent);transition:color 0.3s var(--ease),text-decoration-color 0.3s var(--ease)}.post-body a:hover{color:var(--accent-color);text-decoration-color:var(--accent-color)}.post-body a:has(img){text-decoration:none;display:block}.post-body img{max-width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:8px;margin:30px auto;display:block;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);transition:transform 0.5s var(--ease-out),box-shadow 0.5s var(--ease-out)}[data-theme="dark"] .post-body img{box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}.post-body img:hover{transform:scale(1.01);box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.09)}[data-theme="dark"] .post-body img:hover{box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)}.separator{border:none!important;background:transparent!important}.post-body hr{border:none;background:none;margin:2.5em auto;height:auto;text-align:center;overflow:visible}.post-body hr::before{content:'\0000B7\0000B7\0000B7';display:block;color:var(--meta-color);letter-spacing:0.8em;font-size:0.85em;line-height:1;padding-left:0.8em}.post-body.full-content h2,.post-body.full-content h3,.post-body.full-content h4{font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',serif;font-weight:500;line-height:1.35;color:var(--text-color);margin:1.8em 0 0.5em;letter-spacing:-0.2px;font-feature-settings:"onum" 1,"liga" 1;text-wrap:balance}.post-body.full-content h2{font-size:1.6rem}.post-body.full-content h3{font-size:1.35rem}.post-body.full-content h4{font-size:1.12rem;font-weight:600}.post-body.full-content>:first-child{margin-top:0}.post-body.full-content blockquote{margin:1.8em 0;padding:0.2em 0 0.2em 1.4em;border-left:3px solid var(--accent-color);color:var(--meta-color);font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',Georgia,serif;font-size:1.2rem;line-height:1.7;font-feature-settings:"onum" 1,"liga" 1;text-wrap:pretty}.post-body.full-content blockquote p{margin:0.5em 0}.post-body.full-content blockquote p:first-child{margin-top:0}.post-body.full-content blockquote p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}.post-body.full-content ul,.post-body.full-content ol{padding-left:1.4em;margin:1.2em 0}.post-body.full-content li{margin:0.5em 0;text-wrap:pretty}.post-body.full-content ul li::marker{color:var(--accent-color)}.post-body.full-content ol li::marker{color:var(--meta-color)}.post-body.full-content li>ul,.post-body.full-content li>ol{margin:0.4em 0}.post-body.full-content code{font-family:'SFMono-Regular','JetBrains Mono',Menlo,Consolas,monospace;font-size:0.88em;background:var(--btn-bg);padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;word-break:break-word}.post-body.full-content pre{background:var(--btn-bg);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:16px 18px;overflow-x:auto;font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.6;margin:1.6em 0}.post-body.full-content pre code{background:none;padding:0;border-radius:0;font-size:inherit;word-break:normal}.post-body.full-content table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:1.8em 0;font-size:0.95rem}.post-body.full-content th,.post-body.full-content td{border:1px solid var(--border-color);padding:10px 14px;text-align:left}.post-body.full-content th{background:var(--btn-bg);font-weight:600}.post-body.full-content figure{margin:30px 0}.post-body.full-content figure img{margin:0 auto 8px}.post-body.full-content figcaption{font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',Georgia,serif;font-style:italic;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--meta-color);text-align:center}.post-body.full-content p{margin:0 0 1.4em;text-wrap:pretty}.post-body.snippet-content{font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--text-color);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:2.2;text-align:justify;font-feature-settings:"liga" 1,"calt" 1;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility}.featured-img-wrapper{display:block;overflow:hidden;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:18px}.featured-img-wrapper img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;height:auto;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:0;display:block;box-shadow:none;transition:transform 0.6s var(--ease-out)}.featured-img-wrapper:hover img{transform:scale(1.03);box-shadow:none}.blog-pager{padding:10px 0;text-align:center;font-size:0.95rem;display:flex;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px}.related-posts,.comments-wrapper{margin-top:30px;padding-top:20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color)}.related-posts h3,.comments-wrapper h3{font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',serif;font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:15px;font-weight:500}.related-posts ul{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0}.related-posts li{border-top:1px solid var(--border-color)}.related-posts li:first-child{border-top:none}.related-posts li a{display:block;position:relative;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--text-color);padding:12px 0;transition:color 0.3s var(--ease),padding-left 0.3s var(--ease)}.related-posts li a::before{content:'\2192';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent-color);opacity:0;transform:translateX(-6px);transition:opacity 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.3s var(--ease)}.related-posts li a:hover{color:var(--accent-color);padding-left:22px}.related-posts li a:hover::before{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}.comments{position:relative;padding-left:0}.comments .comment::before,.comments .comment::after,.comments .comment-thread ol::before,.comments .comment-thread ol::after,#comment-holder>.comment-replybox-thread,.comment-thread .comment-replybox-thread{display:none!important;content:none!important;height:0!important;border:none!important}#custom-comment-form-container{display:grid;grid-template-rows:0fr;opacity:0;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;width:100%;position:relative;pointer-events:none;transition:grid-template-rows 0.3s var(--ease),opacity 0.25s var(--ease),margin 0.3s var(--ease)}#custom-comment-form-container.is-expanded{grid-template-rows:1fr;opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}#custom-comment-form-container.is-expanded{margin-top:15px;margin-bottom:15px}.comments-wrapper>#custom-comment-form-container.is-expanded{margin-top:-5px}.form-inner{min-height:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transform:translateZ(0);overflow-x:auto;overflow-y:hidden;direction:rtl;scrollbar-width:none}.form-inner::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}.comments-wrapper iframe#comment-editor{margin-left:0!important;border:none;background:transparent!important;height:100px!important;transition:filter 0.3s var(--ease);color-scheme:light!important;direction:ltr;width:calc(100% + 54px)!important;max-width:none!important;flex-shrink:0;filter:sepia(0.35) brightness(0.98)}[data-theme="dark"] .comments-wrapper iframe#comment-editor{filter:invert(0.9) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(0.89) sepia(0.42)!important}h4#comment-post-message,.comment-thread-toggle,.thread-toggle,.continue,.loadmore,.paging-control-container,.titlewrapper,.quickedit,.post-feeds,#Attribution1,.thread-count,.icon.action{display:none!important;visibility:hidden!important;opacity:0!important;height:0!important;width:0!important}.comments .comment{position:relative;padding-left:56px;margin-bottom:24px;list-style:none!important;overflow:visible!important;padding-bottom:0!important}.comments .comment-block{margin-left:0!important;padding:0!important}.thread-trunk{position:absolute!important;left:19px!important;top:45px!important;bottom:52px!important;width:2px!important;background-color:var(--border-color)!important;z-index:1!important}.comment-header{display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}.comment-author,.datetime{display:inline-flex;align-items:center}.comment-author a,.datetime a{padding:0;min-height:auto;border:none;transition:color 0.3s var(--ease)}.comment-author{font-weight:600;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--text-color)}.datetime{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--meta-color)}.comment-content{font-size:0.95rem;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:4px;word-break:break-word;border:none!important;padding:0!important;background:transparent!important}.avatar-image-container{position:absolute!important;left:0;top:0!important;width:40px!important;height:40px!important;margin:0!important}.avatar-image-container img{width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover}.comments .item-control{display:flex!important;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;margin-top:6px;align-items:center}.item-control .comment-reply{display:inline-flex!important}.comments .item-control a{min-height:auto;padding:6px 12px;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;border-radius:16px;background:transparent!important;border:none!important;color:var(--text-color);transition:background 0.2s var(--ease);cursor:pointer}.comments .item-control a:hover{background:var(--btn-bg)!important;transform:none}.comment-replies ol,.comment-replies ul,.comment-thread ol,.comment-thread ul{margin-left:0!important;padding-left:0!important;margin:0!important;padding:0!important;list-style:none!important;border:none!important}.comment-replies{position:relative!important;margin:12px 0 0 -20px!important;padding:0!important}.comment-replies .comment{padding:0 0 0 36px!important;margin:0 0 16px 0!important;position:relative!important;overflow:visible!important}.comment-replies .avatar-image-container{width:24px!important;height:24px!important;left:0!important;top:0!important;margin:0!important;padding:0!important;z-index:2!important;position:absolute!important}.yt-branch{display:block!important;position:absolute!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;left:-17px!important;top:-20px!important;width:17px!important;height:32px!important;border-left:2px solid var(--border-color)!important;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-color)!important;border-bottom-left-radius:16px!important;border-top:none!important;border-right:none!important;background-color:transparent!important;z-index:1!important;pointer-events:none!important}.replies-grid-wrapper{display:grid;grid-template-rows:0fr;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:grid-template-rows 0.4s var(--ease-out),opacity 0.35s var(--ease)}.replies-grid-wrapper.is-expanded{grid-template-rows:1fr;opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}.replies-grid-inner{min-height:0;overflow:hidden;padding-top:4px;margin-left:-30px!important;padding-left:30px!important}.reply-toggle-btn{position:relative;background:transparent!important;color:var(--accent-color)!important;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;padding:6px 16px;margin:0 0 12px 0!important;border-radius:18px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;min-height:32px;transition:background 0.2s var(--ease);cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:inherit;z-index:2}.reply-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--accent-bg)!important;transform:none!important}.reply-toggle-btn svg{width:20px;height:20px;transition:transform 0.3s var(--ease);fill:currentColor}.reply-toggle-btn.expanded svg{transform:rotate(180deg)}.reply-toggle-btn::before{content:''!important;display:block!important;position:absolute!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;left:-17px!important;top:-16px!important;width:17px!important;height:32px!important;border-left:2px solid var(--border-color)!important;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-color)!important;border-bottom-left-radius:16px!important;border-top:none!important;border-right:none!important;pointer-events:none!important;z-index:1!important}.site-footer{padding:50px 0 40px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:24px;margin-top:60px}.social-links{display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center}.social-links a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:48px;height:48px;background:none;border-radius:50%;border:none;color:var(--icon-color);transition:background 0.3s var(--ease),color 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.3s var(--ease-spring)}.social-links a:hover{background:var(--btn-bg);color:var(--accent-color);transform:translateY(-2px)}.social-links svg{width:24px;height:24px;fill:currentColor}.copyright-text{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--meta-color);padding:12px 0;min-height:48px}@media (max-width:600px){.outer-wrapper{padding:0 20px}.site-header{padding:60px 0 20px;text-align:left}.header-logo-link svg{width:65px!important;height:65px!important}.header-logo-link{flex-direction:row!important;align-items:center!important;gap:12px!important}.header-title h1{font-size:1.8rem;line-height:1.3}h2.post-title{font-size:1.4rem;line-height:1.4}.post-outer{margin-bottom:50px}.post-outer + .post-outer::before{margin:0 auto 45px}.post-meta{font-size:0.8rem;margin-bottom:16px}nav.main-nav{overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none;margin-left:-20px;margin-right:-20px;padding:5px 20px;margin-top:-5px}nav.main-nav::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}nav.main-nav ul{flex-direction:row;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-start;flex-wrap:nowrap;gap:10px}.main-nav li{margin:0;flex-shrink:0}.main-nav li a{padding:6px 16px;min-height:38px;font-size:0.85rem}.comments .comment{padding-left:46px!important}.avatar-image-container{width:34px!important;height:34px!important}.thread-trunk{left:16px!important;top:38px!important;bottom:48px!important}.comment-replies{margin-left:-16px!important}.comment-replies .comment{padding-left:28px!important}.comment-replies .avatar-image-container{width:20px!important;height:20px!important}.replies-grid-inner{margin-left:-20px!important;padding-left:20px!important}.yt-branch{left:-14px!important;width:14px!important;height:26px!important;top:-16px!important;border-bottom-left-radius:12px!important}.reply-toggle-btn::before{left:-14px!important;width:14px!important;height:26px!important;top:-10px!important;border-bottom-left-radius:12px!important}}@media (min-width:1024px){.desktop-date-rail,.desktop-readtime-rail{position:fixed;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback','Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif;font-style:italic;font-feature-settings:"onum" 1,"liga" 1;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--meta-color);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.6s var(--ease) 0.4s;pointer-events:none;user-select:none;z-index:5}.desktop-date-rail.is-ready,.desktop-readtime-rail.is-ready{opacity:0.7}.desktop-date-rail{left:32px}.desktop-readtime-rail{right:32px;text-align:right}.desktop-date-rail .lang-zh,.desktop-readtime-rail .lang-zh{writing-mode:vertical-rl;font-family:'Noto Serif CJK SC','Songti SC',serif;font-style:normal;letter-spacing:2px}.desktop-date-rail .lang-en{letter-spacing:4px;white-space:nowrap}.desktop-readtime-rail .lang-en{letter-spacing:1.5px;white-space:nowrap}}.reading-bar{position:fixed;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:3px;background:var(--border-color);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s var(--ease),height 0.2s var(--ease),background 0.3s var(--ease);pointer-events:none;z-index:6;cursor:pointer}.reading-bar.is-active{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}.reading-bar::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:20px}.reading-bar .bar-fill{height:100%;width:100%;transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left center;background:var(--accent-color);transition:transform 0.1s linear,background 0.3s var(--ease);will-change:transform}.reading-bar:hover{height:5px}.reading-hint{position:fixed;bottom:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px);background:var(--glass-bg);-webkit-backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);color:var(--meta-color);font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',Georgia,serif;font-style:italic;font-size:0.95rem;letter-spacing:0.2px;padding:7px 18px;border:none;border-radius:22px;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity 0.4s var(--ease),transform 0.4s var(--ease-out),background 0.3s var(--ease),color 0.3s var(--ease);z-index:7;box-shadow:var(--glass-drop),var(--glass-edge)}.reading-hint .hint-arrow{color:var(--accent-color);font-style:normal;font-weight:600;margin-right:7px}.reading-hint .lang-zh{font-style:normal}.reading-hint.is-shown{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}@media (min-width:1024px){.post-body.full-content>p,.post-body.full-content>blockquote{position:relative}.post-body.full-content>p::before,.post-body.full-content>blockquote::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-22px;top:0.6em;width:2px;height:1.2em;background:var(--border-color);background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--meta-color) 35%,transparent);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s var(--ease);pointer-events:none}.post-body.full-content>p:hover::before,.post-body.full-content>blockquote:hover::before{opacity:1}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.post-body.full-content>p::before,.post-body.full-content>blockquote::before{transition:none}}}@media (max-width:1023px){.desktop-date-rail,.desktop-readtime-rail{display:none!important}}.mascot{position:fixed;left:16px;bottom:0;width:172px;z-index:30;opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);transition:opacity 0.5s var(--ease-out),transform 0.5s var(--ease-out)}.mascot::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:-16px;right:-16px;top:-52px;bottom:-52px;z-index:-1}.mascot.is-ready{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}.mascot.is-hidden{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none}.mascot-img{width:100%;height:auto;display:block;cursor:grab;pointer-events:auto;user-select:none;-webkit-user-drag:none;filter:drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.16));animation:mascot-bob 4.5s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes mascot-bob{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-6px)}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.mascot-img{animation:none}.post-body img:hover,.featured-img-wrapper:hover img{transform:none}.mascot-bubble,.mascot-menu{transform:none!important}}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-img{filter:drop-shadow(0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.5))}.mascot-dragging .mascot-img{animation:none;cursor:grabbing;filter:drop-shadow(0 14px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.22))}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-dragging .mascot-img{filter:drop-shadow(0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.55))}.mascot-resizing .mascot-img{animation:none;filter:none;transform-origin:center bottom}.mascot.is-hidden .mascot-img,.mascot.is-tucked .mascot-img{animation-play-state:paused}.mascot-dragging.mascot-will-hide{opacity:0.45}.mascot-dragging .mascot-bubble{opacity:0!important}.mascot.mascot-snapping{transition:left 0.38s var(--ease-out),top 0.38s var(--ease-out),opacity 0.5s var(--ease-out),transform 0.5s var(--ease-out)}.mascot-bubble{position:absolute;bottom:100%;left:22px;transform:translateY(6px) scale(0.96);transform-origin:bottom left;margin-bottom:4px;max-width:210px;width:max-content;background-color:rgb(250,248,242);border:none;border-radius:16px;padding:10px 15px;font-size:0.84rem;line-height:1.55;box-shadow:var(--glass-drop-pop),var(--glass-edge);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:4;transition:opacity 0.3s var(--ease),transform 0.4s var(--ease-spring),background-color 0.3s var(--ease),box-shadow 0.3s var(--ease)}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-bubble{background-color:rgb(48,47,43)}.mascot-bubble.is-shown{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}.mascot-bubble::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:26px;bottom:-7px;width:13px;height:13px;background-color:rgb(250,248,242);border-bottom-right-radius:3px;transform:rotate(45deg);transition:background-color 0.3s var(--ease)}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-bubble::after{background-color:rgb(48,47,43)}.mascot.bubble-below .mascot-bubble{bottom:auto;top:100%;margin-bottom:0;margin-top:4px;transform-origin:top left}.mascot.bubble-below .mascot-bubble::after{bottom:auto;top:-7px;border-bottom-right-radius:0;border-top-left-radius:3px}.mascot.bubble-left .mascot-bubble{left:auto;right:22px;transform-origin:bottom right}.mascot.bubble-left.bubble-below .mascot-bubble{transform-origin:top right}.mascot.bubble-left .mascot-bubble::after{left:auto;right:26px}.mascot.is-tucked{opacity:1}.mascot.is-tucked.tuck-left{transform:translateX(-52%)}.mascot.is-tucked.tuck-right{transform:translateX(54%)}.mascot.is-tucked .mascot-settings,.mascot.is-tucked .mascot-menu,.mascot.is-tucked .mascot-bubble{opacity:0!important;pointer-events:none!important}.mascot-settings{position:absolute;bottom:100%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);margin-bottom:9px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0;width:48px;height:30px;background:var(--glass-bg);-webkit-backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);color:var(--text-color);border:none;border-radius:30px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:var(--glass-drop),var(--glass-edge),inset 0 0 0 100px transparent;z-index:2;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(4px);transition:opacity 0.25s var(--ease),transform 0.28s var(--ease-out),color 0.3s var(--ease),background 0.3s var(--ease),box-shadow 0.3s var(--ease)}.mascot:hover .mascot-settings,.mascot:focus-within .mascot-settings,.mascot-settings.is-active{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}.mascot:has(.mascot-bubble.is-shown) .mascot-settings{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(5px);pointer-events:none}.mascot-settings svg{width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0;transition:transform 0.45s var(--ease-out)}.mascot-settings.is-active svg{transform:rotate(90deg)}.mascot-settings:hover,.mascot-settings.is-active{box-shadow:var(--glass-drop),var(--glass-edge),inset 0 0 0 100px var(--glass-tint);color:var(--accent-color);transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-2px)}.mascot-settings:active{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-1px) scale(0.95);transition-duration:0.08s}.mascot.bubble-below .mascot-settings{bottom:auto;top:100%;margin-bottom:0;margin-top:10px}.mascot-menu{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:max-content;min-width:172px;background:var(--glass-panel);-webkit-backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);border:none;border-radius:16px;box-shadow:var(--glass-drop-pop),var(--glass-edge);padding:7px;opacity:0;transform:scale(0.96);pointer-events:none;transition:opacity 0.2s var(--ease),transform 0.32s var(--ease-spring),background 0.3s var(--ease),box-shadow 0.3s var(--ease);z-index:5}.mascot-menu.side-right{transform:translateX(-12px) scale(0.96);transform-origin:left center}.mascot-menu.side-left{transform:translateX(12px) scale(0.96);transform-origin:right center}.mascot-menu.is-open{opacity:1;transform:none;pointer-events:auto}.mascot-menu .menu-title{font-size:0.66rem;letter-spacing:0.8px;color:var(--meta-color);padding:6px 10px 4px;text-transform:uppercase}.mascot-menu button{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;width:100%;background:none;border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:8px 11px;font-family:inherit;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-color);cursor:pointer;text-align:left;transition:background 0.18s var(--ease),color 0.18s var(--ease)}.mascot-menu button:hover{background:var(--btn-bg)}.mascot-menu button[aria-pressed="true"]{background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent-color);font-weight:600}.mascot-menu button[aria-pressed="true"]::after{content:'\2713';font-size:0.85em}.mascot-menu hr{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);margin:6px 5px}.mascot-menu .menu-hide{color:var(--meta-color)}.mascot-menu .menu-hide:hover{color:var(--text-color);background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--persimmon) 16%,transparent)}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-menu .menu-hide{color:#a8a59b}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-menu hr{border-top-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--text-color) 40%,transparent)}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-menu input[type="range"]{background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--text-color) 45%,transparent)}[data-theme="dark"] .mascot-menu input[type="range"]::-moz-range-track{background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--text-color) 45%,transparent)}.mascot-menu input[type="range"]{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:calc(100% - 16px);height:4px;margin:6px 8px 9px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--border-color);cursor:pointer;accent-color:var(--accent-color)}.mascot-menu input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent-color);border:2px solid var(--bg-color);box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);cursor:pointer}.mascot-menu input[type="range"]::-moz-range-thumb{width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid var(--bg-color);border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent-color);box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);cursor:pointer}.mascot-menu input[type="range"]::-moz-range-track{height:4px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--border-color)}.mascot-reopen{position:fixed;left:0;bottom:16px;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:0 50% 50% 0;overflow:hidden;background:var(--glass-bg);-webkit-backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);backdrop-filter:var(--glass-blur);color:var(--text-color);border:none;cursor:pointer;z-index:8;padding:0;opacity:0;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:opacity 0.22s var(--ease),transform 0.2s var(--ease-out),color 0.3s var(--ease),background 0.3s var(--ease),box-shadow 0.3s var(--ease);box-shadow:var(--glass-drop),var(--glass-edge),inset 0 0 0 100px transparent;pointer-events:none}.mascot-reopen.is-visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);pointer-events:auto}.mascot-reopen{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.mascot-reopen svg{width:20px;height:20px;margin-left:4px;pointer-events:none;transition:color 0.3s var(--ease)}.mascot-reopen:hover{box-shadow:var(--glass-drop),var(--glass-edge),inset 0 0 0 100px var(--glass-tint);color:var(--accent-color);transform:translateY(-2px)}.mascot-reopen:active{transform:scale(0.94);transition-duration:0.08s}.mascot-reopen.side-right{border-radius:50% 0 0 50%;transform:translateX(100%)}.mascot-reopen.side-right.is-visible{transform:translateX(0)}.mascot-reopen.side-right svg{margin-left:0;margin-right:4px}.mascot-reopen.is-grabbing{border-radius:50%;transform:none;cursor:grabbing;box-shadow:var(--glass-drop-pop),var(--glass-edge)}.mascot-reopen.is-grabbing svg{margin:0}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.mascot-img{animation:none}}@media (max-width:600px){.mascot{width:96px;left:8px}.mascot{max-width:min(140px,40vw)!important}.mascot-bubble{max-width:150px;font-size:0.8rem}}.error-404{text-align:center;padding:30px 0 60px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center}.error-mascot{width:clamp(150px,45vw,220px);height:auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.14));animation:mascot-bob 4.5s ease-in-out infinite;user-select:none;-webkit-user-drag:none}[data-theme="dark"] .error-mascot{filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.5))}.error-bubble{position:relative;margin-top:6px;background:var(--bg-color);color:var(--text-color);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:16px;padding:10px 18px;font-size:0.95rem;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);transition:background 0.3s var(--ease),color 0.3s var(--ease),border-color 0.3s var(--ease)}.error-bubble::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-7px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(45deg);width:13px;height:13px;background:var(--bg-color);border-left:1px solid var(--border-color);border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);transition:background 0.3s var(--ease),border-color 0.3s var(--ease)}.error-code{font-family:'EB Garamond','EB Garamond Fallback',serif;font-size:clamp(3.5rem,18vw,5rem);font-weight:500;line-height:1;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--accent-color);margin:22px 0 24px;transition:color 0.3s var(--ease)}.error-home{margin-top:0!important}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:0.01ms!important;animation-iteration-count:1!important;transition-duration:0.01ms!important;scroll-behavior:auto!important}}@media print{.top-actions,nav.main-nav,.blog-pager,.comments-wrapper,.related-posts,.site-footer,.desktop-date-rail,.desktop-readtime-rail,.reading-bar,.reading-hint,.mascot,.mascot-reopen,.read-more{display:none!important}body{background:#fff;color:#000}.outer-wrapper{max-width:none;padding:0}.post-body img{box-shadow:none;border:1px solid #ddd}.post-body.full-content a{color:#000;text-decoration:underline}.post-body.full-content a[href^="http"]::after{content:" (" attr(href) ")";font-size:0.8em;color:#555;word-break:break-all}.post-outer{page-break-inside:auto}h2.post-title,.post-body.full-content h2,.post-body.full-content h3{page-break-after:avoid}.post-body.full-content img,.post-body.full-content blockquote,.post-body.full-content pre{page-break-inside:avoid}}

b:widget.title: 檐角日暖，煮沸一壶人间清欢 (Header)

b:eval.expr: snippet(data:post.body, { length: 160, links: false, linebreaks: true })

span.style: position:absolute; width:1px; height:1px; overflow:hidden; clip:rect(0,0,0,0); white-space:nowrap;
